§6Fau Armor§f

§aThe ultimate anti-digamma power armor — 99.99% radiation resistance and complete digamma immunity!§f

The §bFau Armor§f is a power armor set that requires §e10 MHE§f of power per piece. It has near-perfect protection with a small number of set bonuses. It is the only armor in the game with complete resistance to §bDigamma Radiation§f.

§6Pieces§f:
§b• §bFau Helmet§f (hbm:fau_helmet)
§b• §bFau Chestplate§f (hbm:fau_plate)
§b• §bFau Leggings§f (hbm:fau_legs)
§b• §bFau Boots§f (hbm:fau_boots)

§6Crafting Requirements§f:
Each piece requires:
§b• §bFau Armor Platings§f — made from §bYharonite Billets§f (requires DFC)
§b• §bDemon Core§f (closed or suspended)
§b• §bAncient Scrap Metal§f
§b• Various other expensive materials

§6Properties§f:
§b• Near-perfect protection from all damage types
§b• §e99.99%§f radiation reduction
§b• §cComplete§f resistance to digamma radiation (unique among all armors)
§b• Set bonuses when wearing multiple pieces
§b• Requires §e10 MHE§f per piece to function

§cWarning§f: Fau armor requires power! Without power, it provides no protection. Ensure you have a reliable power source for charging before relying on this armor set.

§eTip§f: Fau armor is essential if you plan to work with digamma fuel or spend time near digamma radiation sources. It is also the only armor that provides meaningful protection inside a DFC field. If you don't need digamma protection, consider Euphemium armor instead.
